name: Stereocilia Orientation Distribution Analysis
description: Perform a directional analysis on the 'Organ of Corti' sample image to quantify the orientation of stereocilia bundles. Generate an orientation histogram with at least 10 angular bins spanning a range of at least 150 degrees. Determine the 'Preferred Direction' (peak angle) and 'Dispersion' (spread) of the structures. Save a CSV file containing the orientation histogram data and the summary statistics (Preferred Direction and Dispersion) to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/directionality_results.csv.
